world.headline: Right-wing Keiko Fujimori surges in Peru presidential election odds

nation.headline: Trump asserts he calls the shots on Israel-Iran deal

nation.headline: California primary fraud claims debunked by DOJ

free.headline: Andreessen on the "greengrocer lie" — why we chant slogans we know are false
free.text: Marc Andreessen on preference falsification: the 1985 Prague greengrocer parable, back again.
free.note: Andreessen unpacking Timur Kuran's "Private Truths, Public Lies" + Václav Havel's greengrocer parable. No speculation — maps directly onto modern forced public compliance.
